transactions.desc: Paris was promoted to Triple-A Salt Lake on Tuesday.
The Pittsburgh Pirates traded RHP Carson Fulmer to the Seattle Mariners.
The Athletics recalled  Estes from Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Athletics optioned Morris to Triple-A Las Vegas on Tuesday.
The Cubs recalled Ferguson from Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday, Vinnie Duber of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.
The Mariners recalled Davila from Triple-A Tacoma on Tuesday.
The Cubs optioned Alcantara to Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday, Vinnie Duber of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.
The Cubs reinstated Shaw (back) from the injured list Tuesday, Vinnie Duber of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.
The Cubs recalled Roberts from Triple-A Iowa on Tuesday, Vinnie Duber of the Chicago Sun-Times reports.
The Rockies recalled Criswell from Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
The Rockies designated Thompson for assignment Tuesday.
The Rockies selected Carrigg's contract from Triple-A Albuquerque on Tuesday.
The Royals optioned Rojas to Triple-A Omaha on Tuesday.
The Royals activated Kolek from the family medical emergency list Tuesday.
The Blue Jays optioned Macko to Triple-A Buffalo on Tuesday, reports Keegan Matheson of MLB.com.
Toronto activated Cease (hamstring) from the 15-day injured list to start Tuesday's game against the Phillies, Keegan Matheson of MLB.com reports.
The Rangers activated Winn from the 15-day injured list Tuesday.
The Cardinals activated Church (shoulder) from the injured list Tuesday, Jim Hayes of FanDuel Sports Network Midwest reports.
The Red Sox reinstated Whitlock (knee) from the 15-day injured list Tuesday, Gabrielle Starr of the Boston Herald reports.
The Red Sox optioned Seigler to Triple-A Worcester on Tuesday, reports Ian Browne of MLB.com.
The Mets optioned Senger to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Mets reinstated Alvarez (knee) from the 10-day injured list Tuesday, Will Sammon of The Athletic reports. He's starting behind the plate and batting ninth Tuesday against the Cardinals.
The Brewers agreed to a seven-year, $31 million contract extension with Lara on Tuesday, Jeff Passan of ESPN.com reports.
The White Sox optioned Nishida to Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The White Sox recalled Rock from Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The White Sox optioned Sandlin to Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The White Sox selected Montgomery's contract from Triple-A Charlotte on Tuesday.
The Padres recalled Wagner from Triple-A El Paso on Tuesday.
The Astros recalled Loperfido from Triple-A Sugar Land on Tuesday, Brian McTaggart of MLB.com reports.
The Cubs selected Kelly's contract Monday.
